slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text 'FEBRILE SEIZURE 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '경련 후' white bold, '아이 상태 확인법' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '의식 회복부터 신경학적 평가까지 · AAP 가이드라인 기준'. LARGE prominent line illustration child waking up after seizure white outline on dark background, parent checking child gently. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 016'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '정상 회복 과정 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '대부분 30분 이내' white, '의식이 돌아옵니다' mint #2EC4B6. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON sleeping child gradually waking up, mint outline. Below illustration: mint outlined box with GENEROUS padding. Inside box three rows COMPACT white text GENEROUS vertical spacing: '• 경련 직후 졸리거나 혼란스러워할 수 있어요', '• 이는 정상적인 경과입니다', '• 편안하게 누워서 지켜봐 주세요'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '즉시 병원 가야 할 때 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '의식 회복' white, '1시간 이상 지연' bright red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON child unconscious with clock showing 1 hour, red outline, urgent glow effect. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. Inside: three rows stacked COMPACT, GENEROUS spacing. Each row: SMALL red ❌ icon left + COMPACT white text right. Row 1: '1시간 이상 의식이 돌아오지 않음'. Row 2: '계속 처진 상태로 반응이 없음'. Row 3: '깨우려 해도 전혀 반응 없음'. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left red rounded label: '뇌수막염 신호 확인 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '위험 증상' white, '놓치지 마세요' bright red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION child with meningitis signs, red alert icons around head and neck area. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding. Four rows stacked COMPACT, GENEROUS spacing. Each row: SMALL red warning icon left + COMPACT white text right. Row 1: '목이 뻣뻣하고 잘 안 숙여짐 (목경직)'. Row 2: '의식이 계속 흐리멍덩함'. Row 3: '영아 머리 천문이 볼록 튀어나옴'. Row 4: '달래도 계속 보채고 울음'. Bottom small white text: '이 중 하나라도 있으면 즉시 응급실'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '팔다리 움직임 체크 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '양쪽 팔다리' white, '똑같이 움직이나요?' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION child lying down, parent gently checking both arms and both legs symmetrically, mint outline icons showing movement check points. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding. Three rows stacked COMPACT, GENEROUS spacing. Each row: SMALL mint ✓ icon left + COMPACT white text right. Row 1: '양쪽 팔을 똑같이 들 수 있나요?'. Row 2: '양쪽 다리를 똑같이 차나요?'. Row 3: '한쪽만 약하거나 마비되진 않았나요?'. Bottom small white text: '*복합열성경련 시 일시적 편마비(Todd 마비) 가능'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '신경학적 평가 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '완전히 깨어났을 때' white, '평소처럼 돌아왔나요?' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION parent and child making eye contact, child smiling, speaking, moving naturally, mint outline. Below: dark card background #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. Three icon cards stacked vertically GENEROUS spacing. Card 1: SMALL mint eye icon + '눈 맞춤 평소처럼' white. Card 2: SMALL mint speech bubble icon + '말하기 평소처럼' white. Card 3: SMALL mint body icon + '움직임 평소처럼' white. Bottom thin mint divider + small white text '기저상태로 돌아왔는지 확인'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-left mint rounded label: '발열 원인 찾기 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '가장 중요한 것은' white, '열의 원인입니다' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION thermometer and magnifying glass examining infection source, mint outline. Below: dark card background #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding. Two sections stacked GENEROUS spacing. Section 1: mint bold '체크할 것' + COMPACT white text '• 귀·목·소변 감염 여부', '• 최근 접촉한 감염 질환', '• 발열 패턴과 동반 증상'. Section 2: mint bold '불필요한 검사' + COMPACT white text '단순열성경련은 혈액검사·뇌파·뇌영상 일반적으로 불필요 (AAP 기준)'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Full-width bright red header bar top + white bold 'HOSPITAL 병원 진료 필수'. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION hospital building with emergency sign, red glow effect. Below: large red rounded border box GENEROUS padding. Inside: numbered items GENEROUS spacing, red number circle + white text. Item 1: '경련이 5분 이상 지속됐을 때'. Item 2: '24시간 내 경련이 다시 일어났을 때'. Item 3: '한쪽만 떨리는 등 국소 증상이 있었을 때'. Item 4: '처음 열성경련을 경험했을 때'. Bottom small white text: '*복합열성경련은 반드시 의료진 평가 필요'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT center: '오늘 확인하고' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding center-left aligned. 출처 white small bold. Four sources COMPACT white: '· Pediatrics 2011 - AAP Febrile Seizure Guideline', '· Archives of Disease in Childhood 2005 - Recovery After Seizures', '· American Family Physician 2019 - Febrile Seizure Risks', '· StatPearls 2024 - Febrile Seizure Reference'. Thin white divider. Center: 소아과언니 white bold large, NO quotes, NO decoration. Below: DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small. Thin white divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white. 소아과수첩 앱 · 야간·달빛병원 바로 찾기 mint. No pixel values. No quotes.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
